goal: Add a side-effect-free authority-review intake builder for runtime patch permit issuance request packets while keeping permit issuance, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, runtime execution, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, GitHub, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not issue permits, apply runtime patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, run runtime execution, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Runtime patch request packets can be accepted for authority review without issuing a permit.
Authority review, reviewer, and intake evidence refs are required.
Runtime execution remains false and disallowed.
assumptions: Actual authority decision, permit issuance, patch application, and execution require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing authority ref, and blocked request packet cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Permit issuance, runtime patch application, server mutation, route mutation, runtime execution, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-097 converted runtime patch permit issuance readiness into a request packet without issuing a permit or enabling execution.
